Neighbors for Democracy

Hastings, Minnesota · Est. 2021 · Indivisible

A grassroots community group standing up for democracy, equality, and human rights — and welcoming everyone who shares those values.

Get Involved Learn More
Who We Are

A Community Standing Together

Hastings Progressives was formed in 2021 and is aligned with the national Indivisible movement — thousands of local groups working to elect progressive leaders and rebuild our democracy. We are not affiliated with any political party or campaign, nor are we a Political Action Committee (PAC).

We welcome people from the Hastings community of all political backgrounds who believe in the principles of democracy, equality, human rights, civil rights, non-violence, global peace, and respect for one another. We're a place to learn about upcoming events and community activities, and to stay informed about local, state, and national issues.

DemocracyEqualityHuman Rights Civil RightsNon-ViolenceGlobal PeaceMutual Respect
In the Community

Out in Hastings

From weekly rallies to community marches, here's what showing up looks like.

What We Do

Action, Every Week

✋

Weekly Rallies

Join us every Saturday from noon to 1 PM at Highway 61 & 4th Street — bring a sign and stand in solidarity for democracy and the Constitution.

🌏

Marches & Events

We organize and join local marches and national days of action — from People's Marches to MLK weekends of service.

🗳️

Civic Engagement

We share candidate questionnaires and voter information to help neighbors make informed choices at every level.

🤝

Community Building

We bring people together across backgrounds to build a stronger, more connected, and more compassionate Hastings.

Join us this Saturday

Weekly rally · Highway 61 & 4th Street, Hastings · Saturdays, 12–1 PM · Bring a sign!
